001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.os.Bundle;
004import android.view.View;
005import androidx.activity.EdgeToEdge;
006import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity;
007import androidx.core.graphics.Insets;
008import androidx.core.view.ViewCompat;
009import androidx.core.view.WindowInsetsCompat;
010import androidx.navigation.NavController;
011import androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment;
012import androidx.navigation.ui.AppBarConfiguration;
013import androidx.navigation.ui.NavigationUI;
014import dagger.hilt.android.AndroidEntryPoint;
015import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.R;
016import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.databinding.ActivityMainBinding;
017
018/**
019 * Main activity hosting the application's navigation graph and top-level UI.
020 *
021 * <p>This activity sets up edge-to-edge display, the toolbar, the bottom
022 * navigation bar, and Navigation component integration.
023 */
024@AndroidEntryPoint
025public class MainActivity extends AppCompatActivity {
026
027  private ActivityMainBinding binding;
028  private AppBarConfiguration appBarConfiguration;
029
030  /**
031   * Initializes the activity UI and configures navigation behavior.
032   *
033   * @param savedInstanceState saved instance state, if any.
034   */
035  @Override
036  protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
037    EdgeToEdge.enable(this);
038    super.onCreate(savedInstanceState);
039    binding = ActivityMainBinding.inflate(getLayoutInflater());
040    setContentView(binding.getRoot());
041    ViewCompat.setOnApplyWindowInsetsListener(binding.navHostFragment, (v, insets) -> {
042      Insets systemBars = insets.getInsets(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.systemBars());
043      v.setPadding(0, 0, 0, systemBars.bottom);
044      return insets;
045    });
046    setSupportActionBar(binding.toolbar);
047    NavHostFragment navHostFragment = (NavHostFragment)
048        getSupportFragmentManager().findFragmentById(R.id.nav_host_fragment);
049    NavController navController = navHostFragment.getNavController();
050    appBarConfiguration = new AppBarConfiguration.Builder(navController.getGraph()).build();
051    NavigationUI.setupActionBarWithNavController(this, navController, appBarConfiguration);
052    NavigationUI.setupWithNavController(binding.bottomNav, navController);
053    navController.addOnDestinationChangedListener((controller, destination, arguments) -> {
054      if (destination.getId() == R.id.sign_in_fragment) {
055        binding.bottomNav.setVisibility(View.GONE);
056      } else {
057        binding.bottomNav.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE);
058      }
059    });
060
061  }
062
063  /**
064   * Handles Up navigation through the Navigation component.
065   *
066   * @return {@code true} if navigation was handled; otherwise {@code false}.
067   */
068  @Override
069  public boolean onSupportNavigateUp() {
070    NavHostFragment navHostFragment = (NavHostFragment)
071        getSupportFragmentManager().findFragmentById(R.id.nav_host_fragment);
072    NavController navController = navHostFragment.getNavController();
073    return NavigationUI.navigateUp(navController, appBarConfiguration)
074        || super.onSupportNavigateUp();
075  }
076
077}
